content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.69%, Bank Nifty -1.61%, PSU Banks -3.09%, VIX +3.67% to 17.23 — clear risk-off tone with banking weakness leading. However IT (+1.06%), Pharma (+0.10%) and select chemicals/capital goods names showing strong relative strength on Q4 results. Book is well-deployed at 61% with 13 CNC names; priority is trailing SLs on the strong Q4-driven winners (COFORGE, MARICO, CAMS, BAJAJ-AUTO post-results).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1065.16,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10% unrealized, SL already at 1065 (above entry 984). CMP 1082, SL 1065 = 1.6% gap (above the 1% trail-gap floor). Holding existing SL — Q4 fundamentals strong (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%), banking sector weak today but housing finance differentiated. No-op MODIFY avoided — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1065.16 already locks in +8.2% from entry 984. CMP 1082, SL gap 1.6% — adequate trail buffer. Target 1135 only 4.9% away, R:R favorable. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; CMP 124.26 vs entry 125.10 (-0.7%). SL 121 = 2.5% below CMP. VIX rising +3.67% supports gold-hedge thesis. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong (Rev +22%, PAT +14%), CMP 829.95 vs entry 820 (+1.6%). Current SL at entry 820 — tightening to 822 locks in marginal gain. CMP 830 vs new SL 822 = ~1% gap (at trail-gap floor). Target 855 intact, R:R from here ~3:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock +16.29% today on Q4 + Encora deal news, CMP 1359.20 vs entry 1259 (+8.1%). Stored SL 1341.52 = 1.3% below CMP — adequate trail-gap. Holding SL, raising target to 1450 (Prabhudas TP 2020, Centrum 2179 — 1450 is conservative). R:R from here on remaining run ~5:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3041 vs entry 3025 (+0.4%). Stored SL 3030 already at near-breakeven. Gap 0.36% — BELOW 1% trail-gap floor. This is a self-stopout risk per Rule 18(c). Emitting HOLD instead — engine should not loosen SL. Actually changing to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defence sector running hot post-Q4. CMP 3041 vs SL 3030 — gap only 0.36%, very tight; any further trail would force-stop. Letting current SL stand and accepting a possible stop is preferable to manual exit on intact thesis. If SL fires, +₹80 net; if breakout resumes, target 3225 = +6%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 record EBITDA margin 46.5%, CMP 836.50 vs entry 806 (+3.8%). Stored SL 825 already locks +2.4%. CMP-SL gap 1.4% — within trail-gap floor. Holding SL, target 875 intact (R:R from here ~4.6:1). HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +37% YoY, EBITDA margin +280bps. CMP 1486 vs entry 1490 (-0.3%). SL 1465 = 1.4% below CMP, target 1575 = +6%. Thesis strong post-results, holding through normal noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pharma defensive at 52w-high, Q4 turnaround (PAT +317%). CMP 1603 vs entry 1618 (-0.8%). SL 1580 = 1.5% below CMP, target 1740 = +8.5%. Pharma sector firm today, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong (EBITDA margin 25.5%, refrigerant capex doubled). CMP 2784.60 vs entry 2785 (flat). SL 2755 = 1.1% below CMP. Stock +10% today — momentum intact, target 2920 (+5%) achievable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 record revenue, dividend Rs 47, +9.4% today. CMP 9119.50 vs entry 9100 (+0.1%). SL 9020 = 1.1% below CMP. Capital Goods at ATH, target 9550 (+4.7%) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 revenue +18%, defence book Rs 10,961 cr, FY27 guidance +25%. CMP 1997 vs entry 2015 (-0.9%). SL 1955 = 2.1% below CMP, target 2110 (+5.7%). One-time exceptional weighed on Q4 PAT but operating story intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +30.6%, lending book +32%. CMP 362.80 vs entry 364.50 (-0.1%). SL 354 = 2.4% below CMP, target 384 (+5.8%). NBFC cluster resilient vs PSU bank weakness."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Buyback at 12000 (16% premium to CMP), dividend Rs 150, Q4 PAT +34%. CMP 10686 vs entry 10760 (-0.5%). SL 10440 = 2.3% below CMP, target 11260 (+5.4%). Best-in-class Auto setup, hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1065.16,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1065 (locking +8.2%). Adequate gap to CMP 1082."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, VIX up — thesis supportive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock marginal gain above entry, ~1% gap to CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1341 locking +6.6% from entry. Target raised to 1450."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "reasoning": "SL gap to CMP only 0.36% — accept potential stop on intact thesis vs forced exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 825 locks +2.4% from entry; gap to CMP 1.4%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1465.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong; tight SL at 1465 gives 1.4% downside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Pharma firm; SL 1.5% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2755.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 catalyst intact; SL 1.1% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 9020.00,
      "reasoning": "Capital Goods ATH; SL 1.1% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "reasoning": "Defence/auto-component thesis intact; SL 2.1% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 354.00,
      "reasoning": "NBFC cluster resilient; SL 2.4% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 10440.00,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at 12000 supports floor; SL 2.3% below CMP."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "NUVAMA (+19.7% today, BEARISH research — NSE penalties, regulatory pings on subsidiary, pre-Q4 May 11 board headline risk) — explicit reject, governance overhang per Rule 13. SRF/PIDILITIND/CAMS already held — no double-up. POLYCAB already held. BAJAJ-AUTO already held. THERMAX/NBCC strong moves but at 52w-high after extended runs — chasing risk; pass. APOLLOTYRE NEUTRAL with Q4 May 14 board (binary in 4 sessions) — Rule 11 default no-add. INDUSINDBK SFIO/SEBI overhang unresolved per Rule 13 — explicit reject. FINCABLES would be cluster-stack on POLYCAB — pass per Rule 10. DABUR pending BUY @ 487 still OPEN from prior tick; CMP not provided here, leaving order alive — no duplicate. GABRIEL no full data, NUVAMA rejected, NBCC chase — net no qualifying new BUY today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 61% deployed across 13 CNC names, well-diversified across Auto, BFSI, Capital Goods, Chemicals, FMCG, Healthcare, IT. Today's +1.23% portfolio P&L driven by Q4 winners (COFORGE +8%, PNBHOUSING +10%, CAMS +3.7%). Banking weakness (PSU Bank -3.09%, Bank Nifty -1.61%) and rising VIX (17.23, +3.67%) argue for SL discipline over fresh adds. No new entries today: every qualifying watchlist BULLISH name is either already held (SRF/PIDILITIND/CAMS/POLYCAB/BAJAJ-AUTO/MARICO/COFORGE/PNBHOUSING/WOCKPHARMA/ABCAPITAL/BHARATFORG/GRSE) or has explicit disqualifier (NUVAMA governance, APOLLOTYRE binary in 4 sessions, INDUSINDBK SFIO, FINCABLES cluster-stack). This satisfies Rule 18 — every BULLISH candidate walked through with named reject reason. Cash buffer ₹390K (39%) preserved for new themes post-VIX normalization."
}
